Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; im = Image.open\('public/assets/brand/logo-512.png'\).convert\('RGBA'\); pixels = [p for p in im.getdata\(\) if p[3] > 200]; n=len\(pixels\); avg=tuple\(sum\(p[i] for p in pixels\)/n for i in range\(3\)\); print\(f'opaque pixels: {n}'\); print\(f'avg RGB: \({avg[0]:.0f},{avg[1]:.0f},{avg[2]:.0f}\)'\); print\(f'hex: #{int\(avg[0]\):02x}{int\(avg[1]\):02x}{int\(avg[2]\):02x}'\)")
